name: Oriental Pea Pods and Carrots
recipeIngredient: 1 Medium Carrot, thinly sliced on a diagonal (bias)
recipeInstructions:
1. Thinly slice the medium carrot on a diagonal (bias).
2. In a custard cup, stir together 1/4 cup water, soy sauce, cornstarch, and crushed red pepper.
3. Micro-cook, uncovered, on 100% power for 1 to 1 1/2 minutes or till thickened and bubbly, stirring every 30 seconds.
4. Place the carrot in a 20-ounce casserole. Sprinkle with 2 tablespoons water.
5. Micro-cook, covered, on 100% power for 2 1/2 minutes.
6. Drain. Toss together carrot, pea pods, and walnuts; add butter or margarine.
7. Micro-cook, covered, on 100% power about 1 1/2 minutes or till the vegetables are crisp-tender.
8. Toss with the soy sauce mixture.
